name: Feedback export
goal: Surface page-level action buttons (copy markdown, download json, submit, clear) that delegate work to the ancestor sink via bubbling export-request events.
description: Renders one button per requested format and dispatches a bubbling ce-feedback-export-request event the ancestor ce-feedback-sink handles. Listens to ce-feedback-persisted and ce-feedback-failed events from the sink to flash a transient status line (~1500ms) inside its UI. Layout can be row (default), menu (column), or floating (sticky to viewport bottom).

props.name: subject
props.description: Optional override; defaults to the ancestor sink's subject.

props.name: formats
props.description: Space-separated list of buttons to render (markdown | json | submit | clear).

props.name: layout
props.description: Layout: row, vertical menu, or floating sticky to viewport bottom.

props.name: submitEndpoint
props.description: Optional override for the sink's endpoint, used only by the submit action.

events.name: ce-feedback-export-request
events.description: Fires on every button click; the ancestor ce-feedback-sink performs the actual work.

slots.name: extra
slots.description: Additional buttons (e.g. a custom share-to-Slack action).

cssVariables.name: --ce-text-dim
cssVariables.description: Status text default color; falls back to --ce-muted.

cssVariables.name: --ce-accent
cssVariables.description: Submit/primary button background; falls back to --ce-color-purple.

cssVariables.name: --ce-ok
cssVariables.description: Status success color; falls back to --ce-color-green.

cssVariables.name: --ce-bad
cssVariables.description: Status error + clear button color; falls back to --ce-color-red.

cssVariables.name: --ce-inset-sm
cssVariables.description: Button vertical padding; falls back to --ce-space-2.

sideEffects.description: Status text auto-clears after ~1500ms via setTimeout.
sideEffects.reason: Transient confirmation without taking up persistent UI space.

a11y.notes: Each button gets aria-label matching its action. Status line uses role=status + aria-live=polite for screen-reader announcement of recent persistence.
